title: Analytics - Events are not gathered if user is logged out and has not opted into data-sharing
scenario: Firebase analytics events are still gathered when user is logged out and has not opted into data-sharing
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app while logged out of a Poly account.
2. Ensure data-sharing / analytics opt-in has NOT been accepted.
3. Trigger a Firebase analytics event, for example by adding a new Poly Bluetooth audio device (which fires the device_added event containing the device's serial number).
4. Navigate to the Firebase console and check the event count for the device's serial number.
expected: The event count for the device's serial number should NOT increase — no analytics events should be gathered when the user is logged out and has not opted into data-sharing.
